title: Oscurium
description: This mod adds new bosses, items, tools, armour, mobs and dimensions.
body:
## To see the wiki click on this link: [Oscurium Web](https://oscurium.wilkcraft.work/)

# 🌌 Enter the Darkness

This mod expands Minecraft with **new bosses, dimensions, weapons, armor, structures, mobs, mechanics, and magical abilities**.  
Fight powerful enemies, explore dangerous worlds, unlock unique abilities, and survive challenges far beyond vanilla progression.

---

# ⚔️ Main Features

## 👁️ New Progression System
Start your adventure by collecting **Enderman Essence** from Endermen and use it to summon the terrifying **Dark Golem** through the **Dark Altar**.

Defeating the Dark Golem rewards you with **Dark Essence**, used to upgrade Netherite equipment and begin crafting the powerful **Cursed gear set**.

---

# 🗡️ Cursed Equipment

The mod introduces a complete **Cursed tool and armor set** with extremely high durability and powerful combat stats:

- Cursed Sword
- Cursed Pickaxe
- Cursed Axe
- Cursed Shovel
- Cursed Hoe
- Full Cursed Armor Set

These items are crafted using **Dark Rods** and special materials obtained throughout progression.

---

# 🔥 Deep Void Dimension

Discover the mysterious **Deep Void**, a dark and dangerous dimension hidden behind an Ancient City portal structure.

### Features:
- New blocks and building sets
- Deepsculk biome
- Unique ores and materials
- Dangerous dungeons
- Custom enemies
- New boss fights
- Special abilities and effects

---

# 👾 New Mobs & Bosses

## Dark Golem
A powerful miniboss summoned with the Dark Altar.

### Abilities:
- Immune to arrows
- Immune to fall damage
- Heavy melee attacks
- High resistance

---

## Oscube
A strange creature disguised as a normal block until attacked.

### Features:
- Camouflages itself
- Escapes after being hit
- Returns aggressively

Drops the **Mimetization Crystal**, granting temporary invisibility.

---

## Deep Enderman
A stronger and faster variant of the Enderman that only appears in the Deep Void.

Drops the **Immortal Crystal**, which grants the special **Immortal Effect**:
- Maximum resistance
- Negates incoming damage
- Random teleportation while active

---

## Warden Boss
The ultimate boss of the Deep Void.

### Features:
- Massive health pool
- Powerful ranged attacks
- Throws giant rocks
- Extremely resistant

Drops the **Sculk Rock Crystal**, capable of summoning giant falling blocks onto enemies.

---

# 🌀 Magical Mechanics

## Dark Ring
A reusable magical item with cooldown-based abilities.

## Resonant Essence System
Create a special fluid and use the **Resonant Fountain** to summon the Warden Boss.

## Immortal Effect
Become temporarily invulnerable and teleport away from attacks automatically.

---

# 📜 Paper Dimension

A completely different dimension with a lighter aesthetic and unique mechanics.

### Includes:
- Mache wood set
- Paper-based blocks
- New decorative blocks
- Flying creatures
- Weather-based combat

---

# ☁️ Cloud Rider & Flying Cloud

Fight the dangerous **Cloud Rider**, a flying enemy capable of summoning lightning storms.

After defeating it, the cloud remains alive and can be ridden as a **fully controllable flying mount**.

Use the **Storm Crystal** to unleash waves of lightning against enemies.

---

# 🏛️ Structures

The mod adds several new structures to explore:

- Deep Void Portal Structure
- Deep Void Dungeons
- Resonant Fountain
- Paper Dimension Portal Structure
- Ancient Altars
- Special unbreakable Bedrock Trapdoors

---

# 🧱 New Blocks & Decoration

Includes dozens of new decorative and functional blocks:

- Deepsculk Bricks
- Deepsculk Tiles
- Cracked variants
- Mache Paper blocks
- Colored paper blocks
- Dark Lantern
- Precise Loom
- Dark Furnace
- And much more

---

# 🎯 Highlights

✔️ Multiple dimensions  
✔️ New bosses and minibosses  
✔️ Powerful endgame gear  
✔️ Unique combat abilities  
✔️ Flying mounts  
✔️ New structures and dungeons  
✔️ Custom effects and mechanics  
✔️ Decorative building blocks  
✔️ Survival progression expansion  

---

# ⚡ Are You Ready?

Face powerful enemies, uncover hidden dimensions, and master forbidden powers in this dark Minecraft adventure.
